parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS moex_watchlist (
  secid text PRIMARY KEY,
  board text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'TQBR',
  market text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'shares',
  instrument_group text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'stocks',
  issuer_name text,
  news_keywords text,
  active boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS moex_market_snapshot (
  id bigserial PRIMARY KEY,
  collected_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  secid text NOT NULL,
  board text NOT NULL,
  market text NOT NULL,
  instrument_group text NOT NULL,
  interval_code integer NOT NULL,
  interval_name text NOT NULL,
  from_date date,
  till_date date,
  candles_count integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  latest_open numeric,
  latest_close numeric,
  latest_high numeric,
  latest_low numeric,
  latest_volume numeric,
  change_pct numeric,
  payload jsonb NOT NULL,
  summary_text text,
  source text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'moex_iss'
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_moex_market_snapshot_secid_collected
  ON moex_market_snapshot (secid, collected_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_moex_market_snapshot_interval
  ON moex_market_snapshot (interval_name, collected_at DESC);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS moex_news_item (
  id bigserial PRIMARY KEY,
  collected_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  source text NOT NULL,
  feed_url text,
  external_id text NOT NULL,
  published_at timestamptz,
  title text NOT NULL,
  link text,
  summary text,
  matched_secid text,
  matched_keywords text,
  payload jsonb NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE (source, external_id)
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_moex_news_item_secid_published
  ON moex_news_item (matched_secid, published_at DESC);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS moex_analysis_report (
  id bigserial PRIMARY KEY,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  secid text,
  instrument_group text,
  report_type text NOT NULL,
  model_name text,
  summary_text text NOT NULL,
  payload jsonb NOT NULL,
  knowledge_source text
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_moex_analysis_report_secid_created
  ON moex_analysis_report (secid, created_at DESC);

INSERT INTO moex_watchlist (secid, board, market, instrument_group, issuer_name, news_keywords, active)
VALUES
  ('SBER', 'TQBR', 'shares', 'stocks', 'Сбербанк', 'сбер, сбербанк, sber', true),
  ('GAZP', 'TQBR', 'shares', 'stocks', 'Газпром', 'газпром, gazprom, gazp', true),
  ('LKOH', 'TQBR', 'shares', 'stocks', 'Лукойл', 'лукойл, lukoil, lkoh', true)
ON CONFLICT (secid) DO UPDATE SET
  board = EXCLUDED.board,
  market = EXCLUDED.market,
  instrument_group = EXCLUDED.instrument_group,
  issuer_name = EXCLUDED.issuer_name,
  news_keywords = EXCLUDED.news_keywords,
  active = EXCLUDED.active,
  updated_at = now();
